<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:織田井戸遺跡]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:織田井戸遺跡]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:織田井戸遺跡]]

{{Citation needed|date=November 2024}}
[[File:Aichi prefectural road No.451.JPG|thumb|right|250px|The area where the Odaito Site once existed. The road in the foreground is Aichi Prefectural Route 451 (Nagoya Outer Ring Road) in Komaki City, Koki.]]
'''Odaito Site''' (織田井戸遺跡, ''Odaito Iseki'') was an {{ill|Archaeological site|en|Archaeological site|WD=Q839954|lt=Archaeological site|1=Archaeological site}} from the [[Jōmon period]] to the {{ill|Yayoi period|en|Yayoi period|WD=Q207858|lt=Yayoi period|1=Yayoi period}}, located in Koki, [[Komaki City]], {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture|1=Aichi Prefecture}}, Japan. A full-scale investigation was conducted in {{ill|1981|en|1981|WD=Q2437|lt=1981|1=1981}}, uncovering numerous artifacts. The site is now occupied by [[Aichi Prefectural Route 451]].

== History ==

* {{ill|1981|en|1981|WD=Q2437|lt=1981|1=1981}} ({{ill|Shōwa|en|Shōwa|WD=Q398996|lt=Shōwa|1=Shōwa}} 56) - A full-scale investigation was carried out by Komaki City.

== Location ==

1- and 2-chome, Koki, Komaki City, Aichi Prefecture (Aichi Prefectural Route 451, Nagoya Outer Ring Road)

== Related Books ==
* ''Odaito Site Excavation Report'' edited by Komaki City [[:en:Board of Education|Board of Education]] (Published by Komaki City Board of Education, {{ill|1983|en|1983|WD=Q2434|lt=1983|1=1983}})
* ''Excavation Report on the Odaito Site in Komaki City, Aichi Prefecture'' edited by Komaki City Board of Education (Published by Komaki City Board of Education, 1983)
== See Also ==
* {{ill|Koki Kofun Cluster|ja|小木古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koki Kofuns|qq=}} - A group of [[kofun]] from the [[Kofun period]] in the same area.
{{translated page|ja|織田井戸遺跡|version=102630575|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[ja:織田井戸遺跡]]
<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
{{wikidata link|Q11608252}}
[[Category:History of Komaki]]
[[Category:Jōmon period sites]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:Yayoi period ruins]]
[[Category:Need translation]]
